name: scaner
description: Busca full-text de PDFs remotos com Express 5 e SQLite.

scripts.dev: nodemon --watch src --watch public --ext js,ejs,css,json --exec "npm run ui"
scripts.reindex: node -e "require('./src/db/client').ensureDatabase(); require('./src/services/indexer').runIndexBatch({ limit: Number(process.env.LIMIT || 20) }).then((result) => { console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.reindex:fast: node -e "process.env.OCR_ENABLED='false'; process.env.INDEX_CONCURRENCY=process.env.INDEX_CONCURRENCY || '4'; require('./src/db/client').ensureDatabase(); require('./src/services/indexer').runIndexBatch({ limit: Number(process.env.LIMIT || 50) }).then((result) => { console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
